description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a prominent wraparound porch supported by white columns and a stone foundation. The exterior is clad in blue horizontal siding with white trim, and the roof features a combination of gable and shed styles. The front entryway is accessed by a set of wooden steps leading to a covered porch with decorative railings. Multiple windows of varying sizes are arranged asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property includes a paved driveway with two parked vehicles and a small fenced area adjacent to the porch.
description: A blue two-story house with a wraparound porch, stone foundation, and a gable roof, featuring a driveway and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry steps, wraparound porch, driveway, and two parked vehicles.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the porch extension, side entry, and visible interior rooms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall, minimal windows, and the driveway extending alongside the house.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the porch, side steps, and the driveway with vehicles from a different angle.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with wooden steps, covered wraparound porch, white columns, and decorative railing
